description_long: This is a metal coatrack designed to hang over the top of a door, featuring two sturdy rectangular hooks for mounting. The main structure consists of four evenly spaced, semi-circular hooks, each ending in a rounded ball tip to prevent garments from slipping or snagging. The hooks are supported by a pair of vertical bars, which are connected by a horizontal stabilizing rod for added rigidity. The finish is a dark, glossy metallic, giving it a sleek and modern appearance suitable for urban environments. The design is minimalistic, with no decorative embellishments, focusing on functionality and durability. The coatrack is compact and intended for temporary or semi-permanent use in entryways, offices, or garages.
description: A sleek, dark metal over-the-door coatrack with four rounded hooks and a minimalist, functional design. It features two sturdy mounting arms and a glossy finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the four curved hooks and the over-the-door mounting arms.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the symmetrical arrangement of the hooks and the dual mounting arms.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the hook arrangement and showing the mounting arms' profile.
description_view_3: Top-down view displaying the parallel mounting arms and the alignment of the hooks.
